case_title: GEE CHUEN LEUNG VS. THU THANH NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2010 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUNG, GEE CHUEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, THU THANH $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,477.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-25-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. EDMOND LUI INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. HONG HA, COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, THU THANH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEUNG, GEE CHUEN AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, THU THANH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-19-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, GEE CHUEN
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, THU THANH ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, GEE CHUEN
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-25-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-19-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN, THU THANH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
